title: Developer Advocate
description: SpaceX is hiring a Developer Advocate to champion our flight software APIs and help the developer community build applications that power reusable rocket technology. You'll work closely with our Flight Software team to make technical documentation accessible, gather developer feedback, and identify friction points in our tooling. This is an onsite role based in Omaha, where you'll become the voice of developers inside SpaceX.
responsibilities: Create and maintain technical documentation, code samples, and tutorials for SpaceX flight software APIs and developer tools
Engage with external developers and internal teams to understand pain points and improve developer experience
Build demo applications that showcase best practices for integrating with SpaceX systems
Present at developer conferences and internal tech talks to share technical insights
Maintain a feedback loop between developers and product teams to identify API improvements
Monitor community forums and GitHub repositories to provide timely technical support

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent professional experience

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
